texto: You know how I say, ‘Don’t ask anyone how to get somewhere unless they have been there?’ Well, I have been there – I have written, been published, found success, and experienced self-doubt, frustration, anger and disappointment along the way … But you know what? I have not been to the place you’re going to. This is your journey. Your destination. Disregard everything in this book. Or embrace it. Better yet: cherry pick. It’s your life.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Catherine Deveny que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “You know how I say, ‘Don’t ask anyone how to get somewhere unless they have been there?’ Well, I …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, advice, writing-advice, com foco em viagem e writing-advice.
